---
title: "NeuralGraph.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\NeuralGraph.tsx"
loc: 213
complexity: 29
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 4.25
overall_score: 2.52
---

## Intent
The `NeuralGraph.tsx` module implements the core 3D simulation and interaction logic for the PennyOne visualization. It uses D3-force-3d to simulate the repository's neural structure and provides high-fidelity interaction handlers for node selection, dragging, and real-time telemetry observation.

## Interaction Protocol
This is the primary scene component for the neural visualization. It manages the lifecycle of the force simulation and coordinates the rendering of nodes, links, and agent ghosts based on incoming data from the backend proxy.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 181 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useState](file://react)
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [useCallback](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [useThree](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Html](file://@react-three/drei)
- [forceSimulation](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceLink](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceManyBody](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceCollide](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceX](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceY](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceZ](file://d3-force-3d)
- [*](file://gsap)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)
- [GhostTrace](file://../types/index.ts)
- [NodeLayer](file://./NodeLayer.tsx)
- [ConnectionLayer](file://./ConnectionLayer.tsx)
- [FresnelAura](file://./AuraLayers.tsx)
- [SelectionHighlight](file://./AuraLayers.tsx)
- [TextLabel](file://./TextLabel.tsx)
- [SelectionPanelShell](file://./SelectionPanelShell.tsx)
- [GhostTraceLayer](file://./GhostTraceLayer.tsx)
- [useNeuralData](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)
- [STELLAR_MAP](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)
- [getStar](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)

### Exports
- `NeuralGraph`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `useThree`
- `simReady`
- `hovered`
- `selectedNode`
- `trajectories`
- `ghostTraces`
- `wsRef`
- `dragState`
- `useNeuralData`
- `simulation`
- `i`
- `map`
- `protocol`
- `ws`
- `msg`
- `ping`
- `targetNode`
- `lastTrace`
- `newPoint`
- `handleNodeClick`
- `targetPos`
- `activeNodeIdFromHover`
- `activeNodeId`
- `handlePointerDown`
- `node`
- `startCluster`
- `minDist`
- `pos`
- `dist`
- `handlePointerMove`
- `handlePointerUp`
- `dropPoint`
- `closestCluster`
- `minDist`
- `dist`
- `targetDir`
- `fileName`
- `targetPath`
